calendar.title: Calendar

notes.desc: Write in Markdown and connect ideas with [[wiki-links]].
notes.title: Notes

search.desc: Jump anywhere with full-text search and the command palette.

tasks.desc: Capture to-dos and track them on a board or a list.
tasks.title: Tasks

starter.body:
# Welcome to Novalis 👋

This is your first note — a plain Markdown file living in your vault. It's yours to edit, move, or delete.

## A few things to try

- Link to another note with [[wiki-links]].
- Open search or the command palette to jump anywhere.
- Check off your first task:

- [ ] Write my first real note

Delete this note whenever you're ready. Happy writing!

subtitle: Local-first notes, tasks, and calendar — all in plain files you own. Here's the quick tour.
title: Welcome to Novalis
